title: TesseraQL Simple YAML v1
description: Schema for TesseraQL Simple YAML documents: routes (web/**/<method>.yml), jobs (batch/**/job.yml), queue consumers (consume/**), and declarative views (*.view.yml).
$comment: additionalProperties stays true so newer keys never break older editors; the route recipe enum is kept in sync with the linter by a build-time test.

id.description: Unique document id, e.g. products.page; referenced by tests, coverage, governance approvals, and logs.

recipe.description: What the route does: query-json/command-json (JSON APIs), query-html/page (HTML pages), query-export/file-import/file-export (file transfers), webhook (inbound webhooks), queue-consume (consume/** documents), and the job recipes batch-tasklet/batch-pipeline.

inputPolicy.description: Route-level input handling policy (e.g. unknown-field behavior) layered over the deny-by-default input: contract.

auth.description: bearer | browser | apiKey | mtls | public (deny-by-default: no auth means no access to protected data).

idempotency.description: Idempotent replay for commands: required, scope (default: the route id), ttl (default 24h). A replayed key returns the stored response; a reused key with a different body is TQL-IDEM-4090. Documented in transactional-writes.md.

policy.description: Row-authority policy binds for /*%scope*/ directives in the route's SQL. Documented in data-scoping.md.

outbox.description: Transactional outbox event recorded with the command and delivered at-least-once after commit. Documented in notifications.md and messaging.md.

http.description: Named HTTP sources on a query route (docs/connectors.md, "HTTP sources"): each is a body-less GET against an external JSON API, executed through the outbound gateway (deny-by-default allowedHosts, named credentials, timeouts, circuit breaker) and composed with the SQL results in the response or view as <name>.rows / <name>.body. Query recipes only (TQL-YAML-1022).

url.description: Absolute http(s) URL; config placeholders resolve. The host must be in tesseraql.http.outbound.allowedHosts (TQL-SEC-4070).

query.description: Query-string bindings, each an expression over the execution context.

select.description: Dotted path into the response JSON naming the rows array or object the source exposes.

onError.description: fail (default) or empty: the source degrades to zero rows and the page still renders.

cache.description: Declarative HTTP caching for query responses (docs/response-shaping.md): Cache-Control from maxAge/visibility (private default; public lints onto auth: public only) and a content ETag answering If-None-Match with 304. Query recipes only (TQL-YAML-1025).

maxAge.description: How long a client may reuse the response (duration string such as 30s or 5m).

etag.description: Hash the rendered body and answer If-None-Match with 304 (default true).

emit.description: Topic(s) broadcast to live views after this command commits (docs/realtime.md). A name is lowercase dot/dash-separated segments; the event carries the topic name only, never data.

refreshOn.description: List, detail, and dashboard views (not forms): refetch this view's refresh region whenever a command emits this topic (docs/realtime.md).

datasource.description: The named connector under tesseraql.datasources the route's SQL runs on, defaulting to main. The name must be declared (TQL-YAML-1035); a non-main route cannot declare notify:/publish:/outbox: or sequence allocation - they ride the main connector (TQL-YAML-1036).

queries.description: Additional named queries executed after sql, each bound into the execution context under its name.

validate.description: Declarative validation rules keyed by rule id; each declares one of rule: (expression) or file: (validation SQL). Documented in declarative-validation.md.

notify.description: Notifications enqueued with the command on the transactional outbox, keyed by channel. Documented in notifications.md.

errors.description: Per-route error mapping: constraint codes and statuses onto response fields and messages. Documented in declarative-validation.md.

import.description: file-import parsing and column-to-bind mapping (headerRow, startRow, columns, onError: rollback|skip). Documented in file-transfers.md.

export.description: query-export / file-export output: format (csv, excel, pdf), filename, columns with headers and format patterns, locale/timezone. Documented in file-transfers.md.

provider.description: A verifier under tesseraql.connectors.webhooks (an unknown provider fails the build).

page.description: Declarative pagination: the framework appends the dialect clause; authored SQL carries no LIMIT/FETCH.

view.description: Declarative view documents (kind: view): list | form | detail | dashboard.

pattern.description: Anchored regular expression (TQL-YAML-1012 when it does not compile).

format.description: string: email|uuid|url; date/number: a parse pattern.

file.description: A colocated 2-way SQL file (must exist; TQL-SQL-2103).

timeoutSeconds.description: Per-binding SQL statement timeout override; 0 disables. Default: tesseraql.sql.timeoutSeconds, else 30s.

datasource.description: The named connector this read binding runs on, overriding the route's connector. A step inside a transactional pipeline cannot pick its own connector (TQL-YAML-1037).

when.description: A whitelist-only expression over the execution context; the first matching entry wins.

status.description: The HTTP status to answer when the expression is truthy.
